# Chubo forbidden-deps baseline
#
# Generated by: hack/chubo/check-go-deps.sh --update
# Forbidden prefixes: k8s.io/*, go.etcd.io/etcd/*
# This baseline is an upper bound: CI fails on newly added paths.
# Last updated: 2026-02-11T20:12:09Z
